name: spec-docs
description: AI skill for implementation-first specs and optional architecture governance

scripts.test: node --check bin/spec-docs.js && ROOT=$PWD; tmp=$(mktemp -d); (cd "$tmp" && node "$ROOT/bin/spec-docs.js" >/dev/null); test -f "$tmp/.claude/skills/spec-docs/SKILL.md"; test -f "$tmp/.claude/skills/spec-docs/references/modes.md"; test -f "$tmp/.claude/skills/spec-docs/references/hooks.md"; test -f "$tmp/.claude/skills/spec-docs/templates/diagnosis.md"; test -f "$tmp/.claude/skills/spec-docs/hooks/hooks.json"; rm -rf "$tmp"
